languages.original_text: "The tale of the elder von Valancius was a wild one, and I sort of liked it. But still, it's good that the story got its ending."

languages.text: "Старший фон Валанциус был той еще историей, и мне она будто бы даже понравилась. Тем не менее — хорошо, что у этой истории случился финал".
"The tale of the elder von Valancius was a wild one, and I sort of liked it. But still, it's good that the story got its ending."
languages.original_text: "Старший фон Валанциус был той еще историей, и мне она будто бы даже понравилась. Тем не менее — хорошо, что у этой истории случился финал".

"The tale of the elder von Valancius was a wild one, and I sort of liked it. But still, it's good that the story got its ending."

languages.text: 「ヴァランシウス家の長老の話は、かなり荒唐無稽な話だった。でも、私はその話を少し気に入っていた。でも、それでも、その話に結末がついたのは良いことだ」
languages.original_text: "The tale of the elder von Valancius was a wild one, and I sort of liked it. But still, it's good that the story got its ending."

traits.locale_text: 「ヴァランシウス家の長老の話は、かなり荒唐無稽な話だった。でも、私はその話を少し気に入っていた。でも、それでも、その話に結末がついたのは良いことだ。」

languages.text: « J'ai bien aimé la folle histoire de cet ancêtre des von Valancius, mais il était temps qu'elle se termine. »
languages.original_text: "The tale of the elder von Valancius was a wild one, and I sort of liked it. But still, it's good that the story got its ending."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai bien aimé la folle histoire de cet ancêtre des von Valancius, mais il était temps qu'elle se termine. »

languages.text: "Die Geschichte des älteren von Valancius war haarsträubend, aber mir gefiel sie irgendwie. Aber trotzdem ist es gut, dass die Geschichte ein Ende gefunden hat."
languages.original_text: "The tale of the elder von Valancius was a wild one, and I sort of liked it. But still, it's good that the story got its ending."

traits.locale_text: "Die Geschichte des älteren von Valancius war haarsträubend, aber mir gefiel sie irgendwie. Aber trotzdem ist es gut, dass die Geschichte ein Ende gefunden hat."

languages.text: "Yaşlı von Valancius'un hikâyesi çılgıncaydı, bir nevi hoşuma da gitti. Fakat yine de hikâyenin sona ermesi iyi oldu."
languages.original_text: "The tale of the elder von Valancius was a wild one, and I sort of liked it. But still, it's good that the story got its ending."

traits.locale_text: "Yaşlı von Valancius'un hikâyesi çılgıncaydı, bir nevi hoşuma da gitti. Fakat yine de hikâyenin sona ermesi iyi oldu."

languages.text: «Menuda historia la del viejo von Valancius. Y eso que a mí hasta me ha gustado, pero es mejor que haya tocado a su fin».
languages.original_text: "The tale of the elder von Valancius was a wild one, and I sort of liked it. But still, it's good that the story got its ending."

traits.locale_text: «Menuda historia la del viejo von Valancius. Y eso que a mí hasta me ha gustado, pero es mejor que haya tocado a su fin».

languages.text: “老冯·瓦兰修斯的故事惊心动魄，我还挺喜欢的。不过，这个故事能迎来结局总归是件好事。”
